intro: Down a reeking alley, a ring of onlookers roars around a makeshift pit. Money changes hands. A bouncer jerks a thumb at you: in or out?
title: The Fight Club
description: No rules down here. Ante your money and brawl the house fighters - who cheat shamelessly: they outnumber you, trap you in the ring, swagger in juiced up, and pull every dirty trick in the book. Beat the cheaters down and the pot is yours. The bouncer eyes your wallet: a small ante ({{smallAnte}}), or up the ante ({{bigAnte}}) for the real fight?
query: Do you step into the ring?

1.label: Step into the ring
1.tooltip: (-) Ante {{smallAnte}}. (?) Brawl a 2-mon dirty tag team. (+) Win for an Ultra+Great payout.
1.selected: You toss your ante on the table and step into the pit.

2.label: Up the ante
2.tooltip: (-) Ante {{bigAnte}}. (?) Brawl a 3-mon dirty gang, even nastier. (+) Win for a Rogue+Ultra+Great haul.
2.selected: You slam down the big money. The crowd howls as a whole gang cracks its knuckles.

3.label: Back out
3.tooltip: (-) Walk away from the ring. No bet, no cost.
3.selected: You back out of the alley. Not your kind of fight.

dirtyWarning: No referee, no mercy. These fighters play every angle - watch for the dirty tricks!
dirtyEntry: {{pokemonName}} swaggers into the ring, juiced up and itching to fight dirty!
